Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:5050/api/backtest -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d "{\\"strategy\\":\\"arb\\",\\"use_synthetic\\":true}" 2>&1 | python -c "
import sys, json
d = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
r = d['results'][0]
eq = r['equity_curve']
print\('Equity curve points:', len\(eq\)\)
if eq:
    print\('First:', eq[0]\)
    print\('Last:', eq[-1]\)
    print\('Has equity key:', 'equity' in eq[0] if isinstance\(eq[0], dict\) else 'NOT A DICT - type: '+str\(type\(eq[0]\)\)\)
trades = r['trades']
print\('Trade count:', len\(trades\)\)
if trades:
    t = trades[0]
    print\('Trade keys:', list\(t.keys\(\)\)\)
    print\('Has net_pnl:', 'net_pnl' in t\)
    print\('Has edge:', 'edge' in t\)
    print\('Has sport:', 'sport' in t\)
    print\('Has direction:', 'direction' in t\)
by_sport = r['by_sport']
print\('Sports:', list\(by_sport.keys\(\)\)\)
if by_sport:
    k = list\(by_sport.keys\(\)\)[0]
    print\('Sport data keys:', list\(by_sport[k].keys\(\)\)\)
")

Bash(curl -s http://localhost:5050/api/live/markets 2>&1 | python -c "
import sys, json
markets = json.load\(sys.stdin\)
print\('Total markets with estimates:', len\(markets\)\)
print\(\)
print\('Top 10 edge opportunities:'\)
for m in markets[:10]:
    print\(f'  {m[\\"edge\\"]*100:+.2f}% edge | {m[\\"direction\\"]} | {m[\\"category\\"]:10s} | {m[\\"confidence\\"]*100:.0f}% conf | {m[\\"question\\"][:60]}'\)
print\(\)
cats = {}
for m in markets:
    c = m['category']
    if c not in cats: cats[c] = 0
    cats[c] += 1
print\('By category:', dict\(sorted\(cats.items\(\), key=lambda x: -x[1]\)\)\)
" 2>&1)

print\('Total Trades:', p['total_trades']\)
for pos in p['positions']:

" 2>&1)
